title: AEP v1.2 Invariant Contract Claim
description: v1.2 contract layer primitive (operator source.md L11-14). Every packet declares, in plain and machine-checkable form: 'What must always be true about this packet?' Operator-named 6 examples verbatim: every promoted claim must have a source / every source must have a provenance type / every completion claim must link to success criteria / every score must have a rubric / every rubric must have reviewer evidence / every external file must have a content hash. Turns AEP from 'evidence after the fact' into 'invalid states cannot exist.' Lineage EXTENDS TLA+ state-invariant idiom + Hoare-logic preconditions + Eiffel design-by-contract per scout external prior-art search. Composes_with: v1.1 F18 SourceProvenanceGraph (invariant violations become lineage defects).

type.description: Discriminator. New claim type 'Invariant' added to data/claims.jsonl per operator L13. Composes with v1.1 + v0.8 claim type discriminators.

invariant_name.description: Human-readable invariant name. Examples (operator L13 verbatim): 'every_promoted_claim_must_have_a_source' / 'every_source_must_have_a_provenance_type' / 'every_completion_claim_must_link_to_success_criteria' / 'every_score_must_have_a_rubric' / 'every_rubric_must_have_reviewer_evidence' / 'every_external_file_must_have_a_content_hash'.

form.description: Operator L13 requires invariants to be 'plain and machine-checkable.' This field selects the executable form.

expression.description: The machine-checkable expression. Examples: jsonpath '$.claims[?(@.truth_tag == "PROVEN/RELIABLE" && @.basis_source_ids.length == 0)]' (negation; should match zero rows). Rego: 'deny[reason] { input.claim.truth_tag == "PROVEN/RELIABLE"; not input.claim.basis_source_ids }'.

expected_match_count_on_compliant_packet.description: Sanity check. For negation-pattern jsonpath, expected = 0. For positive-pattern, expected >= 1.

plain_language_form.description: Operator L13 requires invariants to be 'plain.' Civilian-readable. Banned-term linter applies.

scope.description: Where in the canonical 7-file shape this invariant applies.

violation_outcome.description: What happens when this invariant is violated. REJECT = packet does not validate. WARN = validates with AEP12_INV_<name> warning. DOWNGRADE_TRUTH_TAG = packet's claim truth tags auto-downgrade to EXPERIMENTAL. QUARANTINE = packet promoted to STAGED-PENDING.

source_path.description: Operator-directive inheritance per sec73.3. The 6 operator-named invariants live at L13.

external_precedents.description: F18 lineage. Invariant Contract EXTENDS: TLA+ state-invariant idiom + Hoare-logic preconditions + Eiffel design-by-contract.

machine_checkable_predicate.expression: deny[reason] { input.claim.truth_tag == "PROVEN/RELIABLE"; not input.claim.basis_source_ids; reason := "PROVEN/RELIABLE claim must cite at least one source" }

examples.plain_language_form: Every PROVEN/RELIABLE claim must cite at least one source.

lineage_basis.verifying_grep: rg 'tla|hoare logic|design by contract|eiffel' --type md research/sources/
